name: ExtraHop Reveal(x)
description: This app integrates with your ExtraHop system to gain insight into devices, traffic, and detections in your environment

actions.name: Get Device Info
actions.description: Retrieve details and properties for a device

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: Comma-delimited list of device IP addresses to retrieve details and properties

actions.name: Get Peers
actions.description: Retrieve a list of peers that communicated with a device

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address of the device from which to search for peers

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: Amount of lookback data in minutes (default is 30 mins)

parameters.name: peer_role
parameters.description: Role to search for on peers

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol to search for on peers

parameters.name: eh_api_id
parameters.description: REST API ID of the device (default value if 'ip' is also specified)

actions.name: Get Protocols
actions.description: Retrieve a list of protocols observed on a device

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address of the device on which to search for protocols

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: Amount of lookback data in minutes (default is 30 mins)

parameters.name: eh_api_id
parameters.description: REST API ID of the device (default value if 'ip' is also specified)

actions.name: Get Devices
actions.description: Retrieve a list of devices based on specified search criteria

parameters.name: json_object
parameters.description: Json object for get device

parameters.name: field_type
parameters.description: Type of search criteria

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: Amount of lookback data in minutes (default is 30 mins)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting count for the set of results (default is 0)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results that can be retrieved

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: JSON query of device search criteria

actions.name: Create Device
actions.description: Create a custom device (Reveal(x) Enterprise only)

parameters.name: json_object
parameters.description: Json object for creating a custom device

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address for the custom device

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Unique name for the custom device

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: User that created the custom device

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description details for the custom device

parameters.name: cidr
parameters.description: CIDR block for the custom device

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address of the device to tag

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Name of the tag

parameters.name: eh_api_id
parameters.description: REST API ID of the device (default value if 'ip' is also specified

parameters.name: json_object
parameters.description: JSON object for get metrics action

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: Amount of lookback data in minutes (default is 30 mins)

parameters.name: metric_cycle_length
parameters.description: Aggregation time interval for retrieved metrics

parameters.name: object_type
parameters.description: Object type associated with the API IDs

parameters.name: object_id
parameters.description: API IDs for the objects (Comma-delimited)

parameters.name: metric_category
parameters.description: Category of metrics to retrieve. (See REST API Parameters in the ExtraHop Metric Catalog to find categories)

parameters.name: metric_name
parameters.description: Names of metrics to retrieve. (Comma-delimited; see REST API Parameters in the ExtraHop Metric Catalog to find metric names)

parameters.name: json_object
parameters.description: JSON object for get packets action

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: Amount of lookback data in minutes (default is 30 mins)

parameters.name: bpf
parameters.description: Berkeley Packet Filter (BPF) syntax for packet retrieval

parameters.name: limit_bytes
parameters.description: Maximum number of return bytes for packet retrieval

parameters.name: limit_search_duration
parameters.description: Maximum runtime for packet retrieval. The default unit is milliseconds, but other units can be specified with a unit suffix.

parameters.name: ip1
parameters.description: Retrieve packets sent to or received by this IP address

parameters.name: ip2
parameters.description: Retrieve packets sent to or received by this additional IP address

parameters.name: port1
parameters.description: Retrieve packets sent to or received by this port number

parameters.name: port2
parameters.description: Retrieve packets sent to or received by this additional port number

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Retrieve and ingest of data from the ExtraHop system

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of containers to ingest

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app
